## What does this PR do?

<!-- One paragraph: what problem does this solve, or what feature does it add? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `style` — CSS / UI change (no logic change)
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure (no functional change)
- [ ] `chore` — Dependency update, CI, tooling
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows `type(scope): description` format
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code paths
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] CSS changes tested on both light and dark board themes
- [ ] Game logic changes tested with Rookie bot (Easy) and Magnus bot (Hard)
- [ ] Wallet / pool math checked — balances must be zero-sum per match
- [ ] `npm ci` runs cleanly locally
